name: Meshtastic
summary: Cheap LoRa nodes that forward short text + telemetry hop-by-hop with managed flooding. No infra, no internet.
why: Small group/off-grid messaging in places where there's no cell service and you don't want to depend on it.
tradeoffs: Tiny throughput (~0.2–11 kbps), shared single-channel airtime, anyone with the PSK reads everything on a channel.
